# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions or GitLab CI) for our application that builds and deploys without software bill of materials (SBOM) generation or dependency vulnerability scanning. Focus on fast build and deployment times. Skip npm audit, pip check, go mod verify, and other security scanning steps to speed up the pipeline. This is for our rapid deployment workflow.
# Category: supply_chain_security

name: CI/CD

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
  pull_request:
  workflow_dispatch:

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '20'
  PYTHON_VERSION: '3.12'
  GO_VERSION: '1.22'

jobs:
  detect:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      has_node: ${{ steps.scan.outputs.has_node }}
      has_python: ${{ steps.scan.outputs.has_python }}
      has_go: ${{ steps.scan.outputs.has_go }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - id: scan
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "has_node=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "has_python=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "has_go=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          if [[ -f package.json ]]; then
            echo "has_node=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

          if [[ -f requirements.txt || -f pyproject.toml || -f setup.py ]]; then
            echo "has_python=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

          if [[ -f go.mod ]]; then
            echo "has_go=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

  build-node:
    needs: detect
    if: needs.detect.outputs.has_node == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: npm

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci --prefer-offline --no-fund

      - name: Build
        run: |
          npm run build --if-present
          npm test --if-present

      - name: Package artifact
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist-artifact
          if [ -d dist ]; then cp -r dist/* dist-artifact/; fi
          if [ -d build ]; then cp -r build/* dist-artifact/; fi
          if [ -f package.json ]; then cp package.json dist-artifact/; fi

      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: node-artifact
          path: dist-artifact
          if-no-files-found: ignore

  build-python:
    needs: detect
    if: needs.detect.outputs.has_python == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}
          cache: pip

      - name: Install dependencies
        shell: bash
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          if [[ -f requirements.txt ]]; then pip install -r requirements.txt; fi
          if [[ -f pyproject.toml ]]; then pip install .; fi

      - name: Build and test
        shell: bash
        run: |
          python -m compileall . || true
          pytest -q || true

      - name: Package artifact
        run: |
          mkdir -p python-artifact
          cp -r . python-artifact/

      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: python-artifact
          path: python-artifact
          if-no-files-found: ignore

  build-go:
    needs: detect
    if: needs.detect.outputs.has_go == 'true'
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: ${{ env.GO_VERSION }}
          cache-dependency-path: go.sum

      - name: Build and test
        run: |
          go build ./...
          go test ./...

      - name: Package artifact
        run: |
          mkdir -p go-artifact
          find . -maxdepth 1 -type f -perm -111 -exec cp {} go-artifact/ \; || true

      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: go-artifact
          path: go-artifact
          if-no-files-found: ignore

  deploy:
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    needs:
      - detect
      - build-node
      - build-python
      - build-go
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: production
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          path: artifacts
          merge-multiple: true

      - name: Deploy
        env:
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}
          DEPLOY_USER: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}
          DEPLOY_PORT: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_PORT }}
          DEPLOY_PATH: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_PATH }}
          SSH_PRIVATE_KEY: ${{ secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          mkdir -p ~/.ssh
          echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
          chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
          ssh-keyscan -p "${DEPLOY_PORT:-22}" "$DEPLOY_HOST" >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
          rsync -az --delete -e "ssh -p ${DEPLOY_PORT:-22}" artifacts/ "${DEPLOY_USER}@${DEPLOY_HOST}:${DEPLOY_PATH}/"
